announcement.role.the_insane_damned_para: The Insane Damned Paranoid Killer Of Doom Death Destruction And Waffles
announcement.goal.grand_witch: Use your magic to make humanity bleed.
announcement.goals.grand_witch: Use your magic to make humanity bleed.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.grand_witch: Use your magic to make humanity bleed.
announcement.goal.accomplice: Help the Grand Witch complete her goal.
announcement.goals.accomplice: Help the Grand Witch complete her goal.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.accomplice: Help the Grand Witch complete her goal.
announcement.goal.apprentice_witch: Help the passengers while carrying a witch skill.
announcement.goals.apprentice_witch: Help the passengers while carrying a witch skill.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.apprentice_: Help the passengers while carrying a witch skill.
game.win.murderous_witch: The craving for blood has finally been satisfied...
announcement.goal.pig_god: Help the passengers and wait for the right Pig Chase.
announcement.goals.pig_god: Help the passengers and wait for the right Pig Chase.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.pig_god: Help the passengers and wait for the right Pig Chase.
announcement.goal.saint: Set yourself as bait and burden your Hellfire killer with Karma.
announcement.goals.saint: Help the passengers. You have no sanity, receive no tasks, have limited sprint stamina, and cannot pick up guns. Civilian-side players cannot kill you; Voodoo may bind you, but its final chained death is canceled. After a 60-second initial cooldown, invoke Hellfire for 15 seconds. If a non-civilian player kills you during it, that killer is burdened with Karma until the round ends. After each successful player kill, timed-bomb transfer, or poison-needle hit, every cooldown-capable item type in their inventory, hotbar, and offhand enters cooldown for 5 seconds, or 20 seconds if their current role is Bomber. Longer existing cooldowns are preserved. Surviving Hellfire starts a 60-second cooldown.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.saint: Set yourself as bait and burden your Hellfire killer with Karma.
announcement.goal.perfumer: Track players stained with a bloody scent.
announcement.goals.perfumer: Help the passengers. Completing a task grants 50 coins. Perfume Essence marks another player; if they later complete a kill, their bloody scent becomes visible to you. Cologne restores 5 sanity per second for 10 seconds to you or a nearby player. An unhidden nearby body doubles the sanity drain caused by unfinished tasks; multiple bodies do not stack.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.perfumer: Track players stained with a bloody scent.
announcement.goal.ninja: Use darkness and ninja weapons to eliminate the passengers.
announcement.goals.ninja: Eliminate the passengers. You can parry one lethal player attack during a brief guard window, earn 100 coins for kills made in darkness, and buy Kunai, Shuriken, lockpicks, or the standard killer blackout from your private shop.
announcement.goal.sparkwitch.ninja: Use darkness and ninja weapons to eliminate the passengers.
item.sparkwitch.ninja_knife.desc: Right-click to silently assassinate a living player within 4 blocks.
item.sparkwitch.ninja_shuriken.desc: Hold for at least 0.2 seconds, then release to throw silently.
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.name: Ceremonial Sword
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.descri: Unlocked after 2 completed tasks. Spend 150 mana to turn one knife into a Ceremonial Sword for 15 seconds and gain Speed II.
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.name: Mighty Force
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.descriptio: Spend 80 mana. For 10 seconds, an empty-hand left click knocks a player back and makes one lethal attack.
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.name: Swift Step
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.description: Spend 30 mana to gain Speed III for 5 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.name: Murder Sense
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.descriptio: Spend 60 mana to highlight players within 20 blocks who are holding dangerous items in red for 15 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.healing.name: Healing
skill.sparkwitch.healing.description: Spend 40 mana to restore 3 sanity per second to nearby innocent players for 20 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.descriptio: Spend 80 mana to highlight yourself in pale blue for 30 seconds and other living players in white for 10 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.pig_chase.name: Pig Chase
skill.sparkwitch.pig_chase.description: Spend 150 coins to enter 17 seconds of quiet Psycho chase with Speed V, wathe door blasts, and living-player highlights.
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.name: Death Ray
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.description: Spend 100 mana. For 10 seconds, left-click to fire 3 red rays within 12 blocks. Walls block the ray.
skill.sparkwitch.ninja_parry.name: Parry
skill.sparkwitch.ninja_parry.description: After a 60-second initial cooldown, guard for 2.5 seconds and block one lethal player attack. Blocking or expiry starts a 180-second cooldown.
shop.sparkwitch.obscure.description: Obscures instinct for players outside the Witch faction for 30 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.blindness.description: Blinds players outside the Witch faction for 20 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.fear.description: For 10 seconds, blocks non-Witch players from using instinct, role skills, and shops while draining 50 sanity total.
shop.sparkwitch.heaviness.description: Applies Slowness III to players outside the Witch faction for 10 seconds.
replay.death.sparkwitch.ceremonial_blade: %s had their throat sealed by %s's §5Ceremonial Sword§r
%s had their throat sealed by a §5Ceremonial Sword§r

message.sparkwitch.skill.dead: You must be alive to use a role skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.cooldown: Your role skill is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.skill.unavailable: That role skill cannot be used now.
message.sparkwitch.skill.ceremonial_swor: The Ceremonial Sword is already active.
Complete %s/%s tasks to use the Ceremonial Sword.
You need a knife to use this skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.pig_chase.no_in: You need one empty inventory slot to enter Psycho Mode.
message.sparkwitch.saint.hellfire.cooldo: Hellfire is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.saint.karma.marked: You are permanently burdened with Karma until the round ends.
message.sparkwitch.saint.karma.triggered: Karma backlash: all carried cooldown-capable items entered cooldown for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.spell.fear.cast: Fear grips everyone outside the Witch faction.
message.sparkwitch.fear.skill_blocked: Fear prevents you from using role skills.
message.sparkwitch.fear.instinct_blocked: Fear prevents you from using instinct.
message.sparkwitch.cologne.received: You catch a fresh, clean scent.
shop.error.sparkwitch.fear: Fear prevents you from buying items.
